scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix app" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth" "npm run dev --prefix bridges/platforms" "npm run dev --prefix services/media"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix app" "npm run start --prefix services/auth" "npm run start --prefix bridges/platforms" "npm run start --prefix services/media"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix app && npm install --prefix services/auth && npm install --prefix bridges/platforms && npm install --prefix services/media
